name: High-Protein Chicken Alfredo Pizza
description: A protein-packed pizza built on a 2-ingredient Greek yoghurt dough, topped with a creamy cottage cheese alfredo sauce and diced chicken breast. Delivers 113g of protein for under 950 calories.

ingredientSections.heading: Dough
items: Italian seasoning, salt & garlic powder to taste

steps: Make the dough: combine plain flour, baking powder, Greek yoghurt, Italian seasoning, salt and garlic powder. Knead until a smooth dough forms. If too sticky, add a little more flour gradually until workable.
Roll or press the dough into a pizza base on a lined baking tray. Par-bake for 6–8 minutes until just set.
Meanwhile, blend the cottage cheese, evaporated milk and parmesan until smooth. Stir in Italian seasoning and the diced onion.
Spread the alfredo sauce over the par-baked base. Top with grated cheese, sliced onion and diced chicken breast.
Bake for a further 10–12 minutes until the cheese is melted and golden.
Garnish with parsley flakes, slice and serve.
notes: Dough consistency depends on the yoghurt brand — some are wetter than others. Add flour gradually if sticky, or substitute a store-bought low-cal base in a pinch.
